description_long: This is a medium-sized orange pumpkin with a green stem, featuring a carved face on one side. The carving is jagged and expressive, with two irregularly shaped eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, uneven mouth that gives it a spooky appearance. The pumpkin's surface is smooth with subtle vertical ridges running from the stem to the base, typical of a classic pumpkin. The back and sides are uncarved, showing the natural segmented texture and coloration. The stem is short, thick, and tapers to a rounded point, colored a deep green. The interior appears hollow, as is common with carved pumpkins, and the overall look suggests it is intended as a Halloween decoration.
description: A carved orange pumpkin with a green stem and a jagged, expressive face, featuring smooth, ridged sides and a hollow interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved face with two jagged eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, uneven mouth.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the left edge of the face carving and the smooth, uncarved back and side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uncarved, smooth surface and the full green stem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right edge of the face carving and the uncarved surface.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jagged face carving with two irregular eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, uneven mouth; the style is expressive and rough, typical of Halloween jack-o'-lanterns.
